understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to progress through all KA59 levels by moving selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+). Each level required placing a piece on every goal simultaneously to trigger a WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_{direction} in a 3-pixel-per-cell grid. Some objects were pushable blocks (B) which could be shifted together with the selected piece. Walls (#) blocked movement. CLICK switched control to another selectable piece (S) by specifying its grid/pixel coordinates, but many CLICK attempts failed, possibly because pieces were blocked or misidentified. Movement was often blocked when adjacent to objects, but the 'blocked' hints were not always accurate. The step budget was severely limiting, and repeated failed CLICK actions consumed turns without progress, ending the run.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to progress through all KA59 levels by moving selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+). Each level required placing a piece on every goal simultaneously to trigger a WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_{direction} in a 3-pixel-per-cell grid. Some objects were pushable blocks (B) which could be shifted together with the selected piece. Walls (#) blocked movement. CLICK switched control to another selectable piece (S) by specifying its grid/pixel coordinates, but many CLICK attempts failed, possibly because pieces were blocked or misidentified. Movement was often blocked when adjacent to objects, but the 'blocked' hints were not always accurate. The step budget was severely limiting, and repeated failed CLICK actions consumed turns without progress, ending the run.
